close_reason: Implemented goparse, buckgen libraries and CLI; integrated into Nix; removed gobuckify and patches
description:
Create src/go/pkg/goparse/ library that parses Go source files without requiring importable code.

## Goals
Parse .go files directly using go/parser and go/build/constraint to extract:
- Package declarations
- Import statements
- Build constraints (//go:build, file naming conventions)
- //go:embed directives
- Cgo detection (import "C")

## Structure
```
src/go/pkg/goparse/
├── parser.go       # Parse single .go file → GoFile struct
├── constraints.go  # Build constraint evaluation using go/build/constraint
├── scanner.go      # Walk directory, filter files by platform
└── package.go      # Aggregate files → GoPackage struct
```

## Key Types
```go
type GoFile struct {
    Path        string
    Package     string
    Imports     []string
    EmbedDirs   []string
    Constraint  *constraint.Expr
    HasCgo      bool
}

type GoPackage struct {
    Dir       string
    Name      string
    Files     map[Platform][]string
    Imports   map[Platform][]string
    EmbedDirs []string
    HasCgo    bool
}
```

## Reference
- Existing code: src/go/pkg/staleness/imports.go:159-201, src/go/pkg/rules/detector_go.go:47-104
- go/build/constraint stdlib for parsing //go:build directives
title: goparse: Go file parser library
